title: OCI FinOps - Other Internal Spend
description: Internal team spend breakdown for Ops, CNC, and Oracle teams

list.name: sub_team
list.label: Team
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT sub_team FROM customer_groups WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team IN ('Ops', 'CNC', 'Oracle') ORDER BY sub_team

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(total_billed_cost) AS "MTD Spend" FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team IN ('Ops', 'CNC', 'Oracle') AND cost_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND ('\${sub_team:raw}' = '' OR sub_team IN ($sub_team))

SELECT SUM(total_billed_cost) AS "Previous Month" FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team IN ('Ops', 'CNC', 'Oracle') AND cost_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - interval '1 month' AND cost_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND ('\${sub_team:raw}' = '' OR sub_team IN ($sub_team))

WITH cur AS ( SELECT SUM(total_billed_cost) AS spend FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team IN ('Ops', 'CNC', 'Oracle') AND cost_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND ('\${sub_team:raw}' = '' OR sub_team IN ($sub_team)) ), prev AS ( SELECT SUM(total_billed_cost) AS spend FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team IN ('Ops', 'CNC', 'Oracle') AND cost_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - interval '1 month' AND cost_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND ('\${sub_team:raw}' = '' OR sub_team IN ($sub_team)) ) SELECT CASE WHEN prev.spend > 0 THEN ROUND(((cur.spend - prev.spend) / prev.spend) * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END AS "MoM Change %" FROM cur, prev

SELECT sub_team AS "Team", SUM(total_billed_cost) AS "Billed Cost" FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team IN ('Ops', 'CNC', 'Oracle') AND cost_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY sub_team ORDER BY SUM(total_billed_cost) DESC

SELECT cost_date AS time, sub_team AS metric, SUM(total_billed_cost) AS value FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team IN ('Ops', 'CNC', 'Oracle') AND cost_date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '90 days' AND ('\${sub_team:raw}' = '' OR sub_team IN ($sub_team)) GROUP BY cost_date, sub_team ORDER BY cost_date

WITH cur AS ( SELECT sub_team, compartment_name, display_name, SUM(total_billed_cost) AS billed FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team IN ('Ops', 'CNC', 'Oracle') AND cost_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND ('\${sub_team:raw}' = '' OR sub_team IN ($sub_team)) GROUP BY sub_team, compartment_name, display_name ), prev AS ( SELECT sub_team, compartment_name, SUM(total_billed_cost) AS billed FROM mv_daily_cost_by_group WHERE group_name = 'Internal' AND sub_team IN ('Ops', 'CNC', 'Oracle') AND cost_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - interval '1 month' AND cost_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND ('\${sub_team:raw}' = '' OR sub_team IN ($sub_team)) GROUP BY sub_team, compartment_name ) SELECT c.sub_team AS "Team", c.display_name AS "Compartment", c.billed AS "MTD Billed", COALESCE(p.billed, 0) AS "Prev Month", CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.billed, 0) > 0 THEN ROUND(((c.billed - p.billed) / p.billed) * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END AS "MoM Change %" FROM cur c LEFT JOIN prev p ON c.sub_team = p.sub_team AND c.compartment_name = p.compartment_name ORDER BY c.sub_team, c.billed DESC
